name: J.miller's Wild Rice Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Minced shallots, sauteed in Butter
recipeInstructions:
1 Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt. Beat the egg yolks slightly and combine with milk and oil.
2 Beat the egg whites until stiff and set aside.
3 Stir the yolk mixture into the flour mixture until blended but somewhat lumpy. Fold in the beaten egg whites.
4 Gently stir in the minced shallots and cooked wild rice.
5 Pour about 2 tablespoons of batter onto a hot, lightly greased griddle for each pancake.
6 Cook until lightly browned, then turn and cook the second side.
7 Makes about 30 silver dollar size pancakes.
